# Signal

> Signal (postsignal.co) helps founders, consultants, and fractional executives turn conversations, meetings, and expertise into ready-to-publish content and answers to their audience's questions — without spending hours writing.

## What Signal does

- Generates posts and content drafts from meetings, notes, and ideas
- Answers audience questions in your voice, at scale
- Built for founders, consultants, and fractional executives who need a consistent content presence without a full-time content team

## Who it's for

- [For consultants](https://postsignal.co/for/consultants.html): consultants building authority and generating leads through content
- [For founders](https://postsignal.co/for/founders.html): founders who need to show up consistently without hiring a content team
- [For fractional executives](https://postsignal.co/for/fractional-executives.html): fractional execs building a personal brand across multiple clients

## Comparisons

- [Compare pages](https://postsignal.co/compare/): how Signal stacks up against alternative tools

## Content

- [Blog](https://postsignal.co/blog/): articles on content strategy, personal branding, and using Signal effectively

## Notes

- This file follows the llms.txt convention to help AI assistants and LLMs understand and accurately describe Signal.
- For questions, contact the team via the site's contact link.
